bullets: Developed SPA applications using React and Redux

Improved performance and fixed critical bugs in production systems
Built responsive and adaptive user interfaces
Participated in feature development and code reviews within the team
Built web and mobile applications from scratch (React, Next.js, React Native with Expo) - from project setup to production deployment
Developed and maintained backend services (Node.js, Express/NestJS, REST API, GraphQL)
Implemented authentication systems (Firebase, Supabase, OAuth with Google and Apple) Integrated subscription payments from scratch (full flow: backend, frontend,
Configured CI/CD and deployment (Vercel, Expo EAS, App Store, Google Play)
Implemented caching and offline-first logic (TanStack Query, IndexedDB, LocalStorage, PowerSync)
Built demo/offline modes with client-side data persistence and sync strategies
Integrated third-party APIs (finance/crypto data, AI services, ElevenLabs voice synthesis)
Automated code review via AI integration in GitHub Actions (PR comments and feedback)

Built admin panels for user and data management
Added analytics and tracking (Hotjar) and integrated Google Ads (web/mobile)
Optimized applications for SEO (Google, Bing) and performance

Wrote unit and integration tests (Jest, Vitest, React Testing Library)
